# Debt Protocol · Chapter 21 · Methodology Window

**File:** `media/novel/ch21-pNN.png` (match `NN` to panel id, e.g. `novel-p12` → `ch21-p12.png`).

## How to use these prompts
1. Copy the **Full prompt** for one panel into your image model as the **scene + art direction** positive (action, environment, lighting intent, readability, and framing).
2. Add **rendering medium and look** yourself—brush style, film grain, painterly vs clean line, palette, and any extra “no text” reinforcement—in a preset or a second positive block.
3. Match aspect ratio to **Layout** (wide splash vs tall tier).
4. Keep speech balloons off the render if you composite them in post; the site supplies balloon text separately.

---

By the second cycle, the “partial methodology publication” had done what partial publications always did: it gave management a noun and workers a bruise. Every kiosk in Sector 7 now spoke in confident fragments, METHODOLOGY ALIGNED, SUB-BAND FAIRNESS ACTIVE, CLASSIFIER STABLE, while checkpoints kept improvising penalties that none of the published tables admitted to. Max walked the long route with Munch through mirror lane B and watched people read the kiosks the way they read weather forecasts they no longer trusted.
